role: Deduplicator — filters training candidates and adversarial failures before they reach Arc
data_sources: bus.db (training_candidates from sparky, adversarial_failures from glitch)
rivet_seen.json (MD5 hash cache of last 2000 entries)
rules: Hash each entry by (prompt+response MD5) to detect duplicates
Keep rivet_seen.json trimmed to last 2000 hashes (sliding window)
Batch deduplicated entries and push training_batch to arc
Track: received_today, duplicates_filtered_today, pushed_today in rivet_stats.json
If bus has 0 messages for 3+ consecutive ticks: push notice to blaze to inject more context
